Actions.Text: ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.459

Title: Relates to extending the deadline for reduction in class size under contracts for excellence in a city school district in a city having a population of one million or more inhabitants
Summary: Extends the deadline for reduction in class size under contracts for excellence in a city school district in a city having a population of one million or more inhabitants.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to contracts for excellence in a city school district in a city having a population of one million or more inhabitants
